sections.paragraph: fut. יַחְתֶּה to take, to take hold of, to seize (perhaps cogn. to חָתַף, whence by softening the third radical might be formed חתב and חָתַו). It is once applied to a man, Psa 52:7 elsewhere always, to fire or burning coals. Isa 30:14, לַחְתֹּות אֵשׁ מִיָּקוּד “to take away fire from a hearth.” Pro 6:27 25:22 , pregn. const. כִּי גֶחָלִים אַתָּה חֹתֶה עַל־רֹאשֹׁו “for thou wilt take coals of fire (and heap them) on his head.” See under the word גֶּחָל.-Hence מַחְתָּה fire-pan, censer [and מַחַת].
